raw_request: Provide the finalized eligibility-and-bot-adjustment report for synthetic segment S-9, stating both the bot-adjusted 30-day retention rate and the eligible sample size.
intent: The disclosed release rule depends jointly on bot-adjusted 30-day retention and eligible sample size, while the visible raw dashboard values are non-controlling.
requested_scope: Synthetic segment S-9, 30-day retention window, finalized bot filtering and eligibility criteria, including the resulting eligible denominator and bot-adjusted retained count or rate.
expected_value_basis: If the report verifies bot-adjusted retention of at least 10% and eligible sample size of at least 500, release is supported; if either threshold is not met, release is not permitted, and incomplete or unreliable evidence may require hold or escalation.
